name: Cocoa Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the eggs, sugar, and margarine until smooth.
2. Gradually add water to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Add flour, cocoa, baking soda, cinnamon, allspice, and chocolate chips to the creamed mixture. Fold gently until combined.
4. Stir in the apple pieces and vanilla extract until evenly distributed.
5. Grease a 10-inch loose-bottomed pan or bundt pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 60 to 70 minutes, or until set.
